nodes.context: Powerful criminal organization based in Montreal, Quebec, active since early 1900s, part of Irish mafia.
Criminal organization from Boston, with close contacts to West End Gang.
Mafia family from Quebec, allied with West End Gang.
Mafia family from Ontario, allied with West End Gang.
Outlaw motorcycle gang that developed in Canada in the 1970s, part of the Consorzio with West End Gang.
Italian-Canadian mafia families that developed in Canada in the 1970s, part of the Consorzio.
American Mafia, supported the Consorzio's drug distribution.
Colombian drug cartels that supplied cocaine and hashish to West End Gang's associates in Florida.
South American drug cartels that supplied cocaine and hashish to West End Gang's associates in Florida.

edges.evidence_quote: con stretti contatti la Winter Hill Gang di Boston
edges.context: West End Gang has close contacts with Winter Hill Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Rimane stretta alleata della famiglia Rizzuto del Québec
edges.context: West End Gang is a close ally of the Rizzuto family.

edges.evidence_quote: e della famiglia Musitano dell' Ontario
edges.context: West End Gang is a close ally of the Musitano family.

edges.evidence_quote: la West End Gang strinse contatti con queste organizzazioni nascenti. Fu così che nacque il Consorzio , un cartello comune dove le famiglie italo-canadesi , gli Hells Angels e la West End Gang gestivano unite il traffico di droga
edges.context: West End Gang formed the Consorzio with Hells Angels and Italian-Canadian families to jointly manage drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: la West End Gang strinse contatti con queste organizzazioni nascenti. Fu così che nacque il Consorzio , un cartello comune dove le famiglie italo-canadesi , gli Hells Angels e la West End Gang gestivano unite il traffico di droga
edges.context: West End Gang formed the Consorzio with Italian-Canadian families and Hells Angels to jointly manage drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: con il supporto di Cosa Nostra americana e delle varie bande criminali degli Stati Uniti
edges.context: American Cosa Nostra supported the Consorzio's drug distribution.

edges.evidence_quote: che gli venivano forniti da alcuni soci in Florida , a loro volta collegati con i cartelli colombiani e sudamericani
edges.context: West End Gang's associates in Florida were connected to Colombian cartels, supplying drugs.

edges.evidence_quote: che gli venivano forniti da alcuni soci in Florida , a loro volta collegati con i cartelli colombiani e sudamericani
edges.context: West End Gang's associates in Florida were connected to South American cartels, supplying drugs.
